title: Framework Config Schema
description: Schema for framework-config.json — IDPF framework project configuration. Validates both self-hosted dev repos and PHM-deployed user projects via the optional selfHosted field.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference (relative path to this schema file)

domainSpecialist.description: Active domain specialist role (top-level — written by /change-domain-expert and PHM)

activeDomains.description: Active domain extensions for review criteria (lowercase domain IDs)

projectSkills.description: Skills installed in this project (sourced from .claude/skills/*/SKILL.md, sorted alphabetically)

suggestedSkills.description: Confirmed skill suggestions persisted by /create-prd for px-manager discovery

deploymentTarget.description: Deployment platform selected during /charter (null when self-hosted or no platform chosen)

installedDate.description: Date framework was installed (ISO date or YYYY-MM-DD)

frameworkPath.description: Absolute path to the framework root (or '.' for self-hosted)

selfHosted.description: Whether this project self-hosts the framework (true only for idpf-praxis-dev itself)
